title: AI That’s Too Dangerous For You? What we learned from S.A.T.A.N
summary: IBM Technology discusses how AI is detecting zero-day vulnerabilities faster than before. The video explains AI's role in vulnerability scanning, cybersecurity risk management, and suggests that AI-driven approaches and DevSecOps practices could improve system security.
writeup: IBM Technology examines how AI is detecting zero-day vulnerabilities faster than prior methods, framed through a tool referenced as S.A.T.A.N. The video covers AI's role in vulnerability scanning and cybersecurity risk management, and it argues that AI-driven approaches paired with DevSecOps practices could strengthen system security. The discussion connects vulnerability detection, zero-day exploits, DevOps integration, and AI safety, weighing the security gains against the risks of capable scanning tools.
